name: CSS Animations (@keyframes)
performance_characteristics: Compositor-accelerated for transform/opacity; runs off main thread when animating cheap properties
unsuitable_contexts: motion that must react to runtime input mid-animation
strengths: Baseline everywhere; declarative multi-step keyframe sequencing
Looping, delay, direction, fill-mode and play-state without JS
Compositor-friendly for transform/opacity; good battery behaviour
Pairs with prefers-reduced-motion for accessible fallbacks
weaknesses: Hard to coordinate complex timelines or stagger many elements
No runtime control of progress without the Web Animations API
Animating layout properties causes reflow and dropped frames
